CustomField.description: JSON object containing the input data used to evaluate this criterion (e.g., {"acreage": 4.2, "action_type": "OilGas_Drilling", "agency": "BLM"}). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.evaluation_data.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: JSON input data used to evaluate this criterion.
CustomField.label: Evaluation Data (JSON)
